items.title: Trail Cam Footage Shows World’s Dumbest Pigeon Walking Into Falcon’s Nest
items.summary: If you're a pigeon, there is one bird you really want to avoid: falcons. Why? Because an urban falcon's diet almost entirely consists of pigeons. [Read More]

items.title: Claude can now use your 1Password credentials for you

items.title: Cape Town Gallery Accused of Withholding Pay and Artworks
